evidence.source_title: Israel kills wanted Hezbollah commander behind the establishment of Iraq's Iran-backed militias
evidence.description: Daqduq was appointed deputy commander of the Radwan Force in late September 2024 after Israeli airstrikes devastated the unit's leadership; he was killed in this role on 10 November 2024.

editorial_notes: Appointed deputy commander late September 2024 after Radwan Force leadership decimated by Israeli strikes. Killed 10 November 2024.
